title: romulea bulbocodium subsp. subpalustris
intro: Romulea bulbocodium subsp. subpalustris is a subspecies of Romulea bulbocodium, a flowering plant that belongs to the family Iridaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of Romulea bulbocodium subsp. subpalustris include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and protect the respiratory system. Romulea bulbocodium subsp. subpalustris can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
